---
name: Bug Report
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Command

The exact command you ran:

```bash
pharos <package>@<version> --path /path/to/project
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Paste the full output if possible.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11]
- Pharos version: [e.g. 0.2.0]
- Installed via: [e.g. npx, npm -g]
- Lockfile type: [e.g. yarn.lock, package-lock.json]

## Additional context

Any other info that might help (e.g. the lockfile snippet, project structure).
